title: Cryptographic Failures - Plaintext Password Storage
goal: Find the admin password from exposed data and login.
hint: Sensitive data should never be stored directly.

whyVulnerable.explanation: Passwords were stored directly in the database without encryption or hashing.
whyVulnerable.answer: Anyone accessing the database can read passwords instantly.

steps: Password reused to login as admin.
attackFlow.answer: Plaintext storage converts data leaks into account compromise.

secureFix.explanation: Passwords must be hashed using strong algorithms like bcrypt.
secureFix.answer: Hashing prevents attackers from recovering original passwords.
